tasks.title: Read and summarize project structure
tasks.prompt: Look at the current project. Read the package.json and any config files you find. Summarize the tech stack, test framework, and build system in 3-5 bullet points.

tasks.title: Find a function definition by name
tasks.prompt: Find where the function 'resolveCapabilities' is defined. Show the file path and a brief description of what it does.

tasks.title: Find and describe a failing test
tasks.prompt: Run the tests for this project. Identify any failing test and describe what assertion failed. Do NOT modify any code.

tasks.title: Add a TODO comment to a source file
tasks.prompt: Add a single-line TODO comment '// TODO: add input validation' to the top of src/benchmark/types.ts. Do not modify any other code.

tasks.title: Fix a typo in a source comment
tasks.prompt: In src/benchmark/store.ts, change the word 'parseable' to 'parsable' in the test description. Verify the change was applied.

tasks.title: Repair a deliberately broken test assertion
tasks.prompt: The test file src/benchmark/__tests__/report.test.ts has a broken assertion: the 'handles empty runs gracefully' test expects the wrong value for medianToolCalls. Fix it to expect 0 instead of 1.

tasks.title: Extract a repeated helper into a shared function
tasks.prompt: Both src/benchmark/store.ts and src/benchmark/report.ts have duplicate median-computation logic. Extract the median function into a new file src/benchmark/median.ts, update both callers to import from it, and run the benchmark tests to verify everything still passes.

tasks.title: Add a unit test for the benchmark types
tasks.prompt: Add a new test in src/benchmark/__tests__/types.test.ts that verifies the benchmarkFailureSchema rejects a failure object with a negative exitCode field. Run the test to confirm it passes.

tasks.title: Handle edge case: empty strings in task tags
tasks.prompt: In src/benchmark/types.ts, the taskDefinitionSchema allows empty string tags (tags: ['']). Modify the schema to require each tag to be at least 2 characters long. Update the types.test.ts to test this constraint.

tasks.title: Read and cross-reference multiple related files
tasks.prompt: Read src/benchmark/types.ts, src/benchmark/store.ts, and src/benchmark/report.ts. Describe how they relate to each other: which file imports from which, and whether any type is used before it's validated.
